nipopows.title: NIPoPoWs
nipopows.subtitle: Non-Interactive Proofs of Proof-of-Work
nipopows.description: Succinct proofs of chain work for trust-minimized verification

seo.title: NIPoPoWs - Non-Interactive Proofs of Proof-of-Work | Ergo
seo.description: Learn about NIPoPoWs on Ergo - compact cryptographic proofs enabling light clients, cross-chain bridges, and mobile verification without full blockchain sync.
seo.keywords: NIPoPoWs, Non-Interactive Proofs, Proof-of-Work, light clients, cross-chain, mobile verification, succinct proofs, Ergo blockchain

features.title: Interoperability
features.description: Enables SPV/NIPoPoW-style protocols and trust-minimized cross-chain interactions.

features.title: Light Clients
features.description: Secure verification on mobile or web without downloading the full blockchain.

features.title: Fast Verification
features.description: Verify chain work in seconds using compact proofs instead of full syncs.

features.title: Trustless
features.description: No trusted relays or validators; verification follows PoW assumptions.

useCases.title: Cross-Chain Protocols
useCases.description: Trust-minimized bridges and SPV-style interoperability between blockchains.

useCases.title: Mobile Wallets
useCases.description: Light wallets that prove chain work with succinct proofs for instant sync.

useCases.title: Oracle Systems
useCases.description: Efficient verification of external chain data for smart contracts.

useCases.title: Sidechains
useCases.description: Sidechains can verify Layer 1 succinctly for security and liveness guarantees.

useCases.title: DeFi Protocols
useCases.description: Fast verification for cross-chain DeFi without waiting for full synchronization.

useCases.title: Payment Verification
useCases.description: Instant payment confirmation for merchants without running full nodes.
